title: ophrys argolica subsp. aegaea
intro: Ophrys argolica subsp. aegaea, also known as the Aegaea bee orchid, is a rare and endemic orchid species found in Greece. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The Aegaea bee orchid is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing digestive issues, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, including infusions and decoctions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any plant-based remedies.
